full_text:
Omental tumor surrounded by soft omental tissue was divided in two pieces. The piece was digested with dispase by Abhilash for 30 min. Dispase dissociation was done in 20 mL of Dispase + dissociation medium The corresponding pellets after diggestions were both small, and were resuspended in 1 mL of dissociation media.

Dispase dissociation:

Cell count 1):

total: 5.5E66

live: 3.9 E6

viability: 70.9%

size: 7.6um

Cell count 2):

total: 5.05E6

live: 3.5E6

viability: 69.3

size: 8.2um

Cell count: 5.3E6

Total volume: 1 mL

The cell count was too low for conducting further experiments.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
